name: Godcoder
desc: A local-first, open-source coding agent for your desktop. Bring your own LLM key; your code stays on your machine and only ever leaves to the model provider. T…
descFull: A local-first, open-source coding agent for your desktop. Bring your own LLM key; your code stays on your machine and only ever leaves to the model provider. The AI Agent builds its own Harnes.
